identity_baseline: An Earthman undergoing a supernatural transformation.
physical_build: agile and capable of high-intensity physical prowess.
movement_language: extreme agility, high-leaping capabilities, and earthly striking tactics (chin/stomach strikes).
stable_visual_summary: An Earthman characterized by extreme physical agility and high-leaping capabilities, likely due to low gravity. Following a supernatural transformation, the character is initially seen in a naked state, having left behind a "lifeless" physical shell of his original form. He moves with high intensity, capable of both acrobatic leaps over obstacles like chariots and grounded, earthly combat strikes.
continuity_constraints: Character possesses a "lifeless" physical shell left behind from a transformation.
unresolved_ambiguities: The specific visual appearance of the post-transformation body is not fully detailed beyond agility and combat prowess.
Costume/clothing state in later chapters (CH006+) is unknown.
